meaning: adv.鏈夌郴缁熷湴,鏈夋柟娉曞湴
examples: She methodically put the things into her suitcase.
They sorted slowly and methodically through the papers.
In closing arguments, defense lawyers will have to fight a methodically assembled criminal case.
Warren Apel claims to have proof, and has methodically listed Biblical references to verify his claim.
